title: metathelypteris fragilis
intro: Metathelypteris fragilis, also known as the fragile fern or fragile lady fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Asia and parts of Eastern Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, saponins, and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Metathelypteris fragilis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and reduce stress.
